input.fetched_text: Evaluating LLMs is non-trivial. Reference-free metrics like BLEU fail for generation. Modern evaluation uses pairwise human comparison, automated judge models, and benchmark suites like MMLU, HumanEval, MT-Bench. This post walks through hands-on examples of each.
